agent-harness.description: Framework for coordinating specialized AI agents

agent.name: planner
agent.role: Creates structured implementation plans from requirements
agent.output: Detailed step-by-step plan with acceptance criteria

agent.name: reviewer
agent.role: Reviews code for quality, security, and patterns

agent.name: scout
agent.input: Query about codebase structure or patterns

coordination.escalation: Return to human when confidence is low
coordination.audit-trail: Log all agent decisions and outputs
